message:
feat: track cache tokens in serfeval and persist session snapshots

EvalCollector now aggregates cache_read_tokens and cache_write_tokens
from llm.Usage. serfeval saves the session snapshot as a .session.json
file alongside the output for post-hoc analysis of per-turn usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
